description: Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortThe numbers 3 and 9 embossed on caseSteel strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and styleBlack coloured dial with date display at the 4 hour mark and the branding with logo at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
